allow: PowerShell($runId = 'bench-1777827333'; $sqlPath = 'D:\\scheduler\\bench\\measure-e2e.sql'; $e2e = Get-Content -Raw $sqlPath | docker exec -i scheduler-postgres psql -U postgres -d jobscheduler -v "run_id=$runId" -A -F '|' -t; $e2e)

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); $up = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/actuator/health' -TimeoutSec 3; if \($h.status -eq 'UP'\) { $up = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep 2 } }; if \($up\) { 'app is UP' } else { 'app did not become healthy in 60s'; exit 1 })

PowerShell(docker exec scheduler-postgres psql -U postgres -d jobscheduler -c "SELECT MIN\(created_at\) AS first_stuck, MAX\(created_at\) AS last_stuck, MIN\(queued_at\) AS first_queued, MAX\(queued_at\) AS last_queued FROM jobs WHERE idempotency_key LIKE 'bench-1777828403-%' AND job_status='QUEUED'")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(120\); $up = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/actuator/health' -TimeoutSec 3; if \($h.status -eq 'UP'\) { $up = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep 3 } }; if \($up\) { '--app UP--'; .\\bench\\run-bench.ps1 -Rps 100 -Duration 60s -DrainTimeoutSec 180 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 18 } else { 'app NOT healthy' })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(120\); $up = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/actuator/health' -TimeoutSec 3; if \($h.status -eq 'UP'\) { $up = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep 3 } }; if \($up\) { '--app UP, running 200 rps × 60s--'; .\\bench\\run-bench.ps1 -Rps 200 -Duration 60s -DrainTimeoutSec 240 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 14 } else { 'app NOT healthy' })
PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/actuator/health' -TimeoutSec 3\).status } catch { 'app DOWN, run docker compose up -d first' })

PowerShell(docker exec scheduler-postgres psql -U postgres -d jobscheduler -c "SELECT id, job_status, idempotency_key, created_at, queued_at, started_at, completed_at FROM jobs WHERE idempotency_key LIKE 'recov-1777830383-%' AND job_status NOT IN \('SUCCESS','DEAD','CANCELED'\)")

PowerShell(docker exec scheduler-postgres psql -U postgres -d jobscheduler -c "SELECT execution_status, attempt_number, started_at, completed_at, error_message FROM execution_logs el JOIN jobs j ON j.id=el.job_id WHERE j.idempotency_key LIKE 'recov-1777830383-%' AND j.job_status NOT IN \('SUCCESS','DEAD'\)")

PowerShell(docker exec scheduler-postgres psql -U postgres -d jobscheduler -c "SELECT el.execution_status, el.attempt_number, el.started_at, el.completed_at, el.error_message FROM execution_logs el JOIN jobs j ON j.id=el.job_id WHERE j.idempotency_key='recov-1777830383-21'")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(120\); $up = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/actuator/health' -TimeoutSec 3; if \($h.status -eq 'UP'\) { $up = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep 3 } }; if \($up\) { 'app UP - warmup run \(will discard\)'; .\\bench\\run-bench.ps1 -Rps 200 -Duration 60s -DrainTimeoutSec 180 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8 } else { 'app NOT healthy' })
